name: Ludwig Lewisohn
abstract: Ludwig Lewisohn (May 30, 1882 – December 31, 1955) was a novelist, literary critic, the drama critic for The Nation and then its associate editor. He was the editor of the New Palestine, an American Zionist journal.

about_quotes.speaker: Dan Morgenstern
about_quotes.evidence: My father knew Ludwig Lewisohn, who had been a quite famous figure in American literature.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dan Morgenstern — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
